---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the use case that would benefit from this feature.

## Proposed solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Describe them here.

## Additional context

Any other information that would be helpful (screenshots, examples, related issues, etc.).
